patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Rogue Frontier Patch 4
description: Rogue Frontier Patch 4 Combat Balance Changes (26 March 2025) — Frost Staffs, Holy Staffs, Nature Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Swords, Helmets, Shoes, Capes, Miscellaneous (Hellgates).

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Frost Staffs Arctic Volley Arctic Staff Holy Staffs Desperate Prayer Holy Staff Nature Staffs Spiritual Seed Druidic Staff Shapeshifter Staffs Werewolf Transformation Bloodmoon Staff Swords Limitbreaker Infinity Blade Helmets Smokebomb Hellion Hood Shoes Crush Charge Duskweaver Boots Capes Berserk Keeper Cape Devious Trap Heretic Cape Mark of the Raven Morgana Cape Miscellaneous Hellgates Rising Lava

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Arctic Volley Arctic Staff Slow per hit 10% 1s stacks 6

changes.raw_text: Arctic Volley: Slow per hit: 10% for 1s (stacks up to 6 times)
notes: Each icicle now slows all targets hit: 10% for 1s (stacks up to 6 times)

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Desperate Prayer Holy Staff Energy cost 12 15

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Spiritual Seed Druidic Staff Recast cooldown 25s 20s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Werewolf Transformation Bloodmoon Staff Transformation health 1100 1000

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Limitbreaker Infinity Blade Damage buff duration 7s 5s

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Smokebomb Hellion Hood no longer silences group members

changes.raw_text: Smokebomb: No longer silences group members

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Crush Charge Duskweaver Boots Stun 2.35s 2.5s

subsections.heading: Capes
subsections.searchable_text: Capes Berserk Keeper Cape Base cooldown 112.5 150 Cooldown reduction 2.5s 7.5s 95s 98s 700IP 73s 30s 1600IP Buff duration 6s 5s Devious Trap Heretic Cape 2.5s 7s 95s 101s 73s 38s Mark of the Raven Morgana Cape 3.1s 6s 98s 78s 70s 24s Buff 8s 5s

changes.raw_text: Berserk: Base cooldown: 112.5 → 150; Cooldown reduction: 2.5s → 7.5s (95s→98s at 700 IP, 73s→30s at 1600 IP); Buff duration: 6s → 5s
Devious Trap: Base cooldown: 112.5 → 150; Cooldown reduction: 2.5s → 7s (95s→101s at 700 IP, 73s→38s at 1600 IP)
Mark of the Raven: Cooldown reduction: 3.1s → 6s (98s→78s at 700 IP, 70s→24s at 1600 IP); Buff duration: 8s → 5s

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Hellgates Rising Lava stacks persist knocked down shields immunity

changes.raw_text: Rising Lava stacks now persist after being knocked down while inside the lava. Rising Lava stacks now break shields and cause immunity against shield effects.
notes: Rising Lava stacks now persist after being knocked down while inside the lava
Rising Lava stacks now break shields and cause immunity against shield effects
